# Pain in the Shed

> MEDIA layer of the DefendableOS ecosystem · the cost-of-intelligence podcast.
> Every episode answers one question: what did it cost to mint this truth?

## Surface
- painintheshed.com (CF Pages · auto-deploy from git push)
- /rss.xml (canonical RSS · all platforms pull from here)

## 8 Episode Lanes
- cost-to-mint              what one trusted AI artifact actually costs
- hyperscaler-pain           why big AI is expensive · fragile · power-hungry
- gpu-street-prices          5090s · 3090s · RTX 6000s · Blackwell · used compute
- vast-ai-field-notes        what renters do · what breaks · what earns
- edge-appliance-economics   why not every job needs a hyperscaler
- energy-is-the-receipt      power draw · thermal · cost per deed
- false-honey                when AI looks smart but fails the assignment
- repair-lift                the economics of fixing AI

## Signature segment
Every episode closes with the Cost-to-Mint readout · 8-line breakdown plus
hyperscaler-equivalent and human-only-equivalent comparisons. Cumulative ledger
lives at /cost-to-mint.

## Voice
Operator-grade · CRE-broker cadence · NO sponsored content · NO paywalls ·
NO platform exclusives · NO "subscribe and like" outros.
Ring ring · to the shed.

## Cross-rail
- mrdefendable.com (FACE)
- defendableos.com (SYSTEM)
- ledger.mrdefendable.com (LEDGER)
- chat.mrdefendable.com (CHAT)
- offensetotheshed.com (CULTURE · written sibling)
- defendabledocs.com (DOCS)
